folksonomy.title: Inneall Folkonomy
folksonomy.subtitle: Taiscéalaí Eochracha
folksonomy.description: Le Folksonomy, is féidir le húsáideoirí clibeanna saincheaptha a chur le táirgí. Brabhsáil na heochracha go léir atá ar fáil thíos, déan cuardach ar eochracha sonracha, nó cliceáil ar aon eochair chun táirgí a úsáideann í a fheiceáil.
folksonomy.progress_bar: Usage frequency indicator: {percent}% relative to other keys

key_visualization_guide.title: Key Visualization Guide:
key_visualization_guide.badge_products_end: shows the number of products using this key
key_visualization_guide.badge_values_end: shows the number of unique values for this key
key_visualization_guide.progress_bar: The progress bar represents how commonly the key is used relative to other keys

folksonomy.no_keys_available: No Folksonomy keys available. Keys will appear here once they are created.
folksonomy.no_keys_found: No keys found with the current search query.

home.intro_1: Is uirlis é Open Food Facts Explorer chun bunachar sonraí Open Food Facts a iniúchadh.
home.intro_2: Is féidir leat cód táirge a iontráil sa bharra cuardaigh thuas chun tús a chur leis nó cliceáil ar cheann de na táirgí thíos.

preferences.title: Edit your preferences
preferences.subtitle: Your preferences are kept in your browser and never sent to Open Food Facts or anyone else.
preferences.classify_products: Classify products according to your preferences
preferences.classify_products_desc: Enable personalized product classification based on your preferences.
preferences.default_description: Nutri-Score, Green-Score and food processing level (NOVA)

folksonomy.intro_before: These properties are created and filled by users for any kind of usages. Feel free to add your own. The properties and values you create
folksonomy.link_properties: the list of properties already used by the community
folksonomy.link_docs: properties' documentation and its search engine
folksonomy.warning: Bíodh a fhios agat go bhféadfadh an tsamhail sonraí a bheith modhnaithe. Úsáid ar do phriacal féin.
folksonomy.footer_after: . Don't hesitate to participate or give feedback.

datasources.title: Foinsí Sonraí
datasources.last_modified_t: Eagarthóireacht dheireanach ar leathanach an táirge ar {date} le
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Uaslódáil íomhánna soiléire den táirge, na comhábhair agus na fíricí cothaithe chun cabhrú le daoine eile an táirge a aithint.
info.basic_info: Cuir na príomhshonraí faoin táirge ar fáil, amhail cainníocht, pacáistiú agus monaróir.
info.origin_traceability: Provide origin and traceability information, such as manufacturing places, origins of ingredients, and traceability codes.
info.languages: Cuir ainmneacha agus tuairiscí táirgí i dteangacha éagsúla leis chun an táirge a dhéanamh inrochtana ag níos mó úsáideoirí.
info.ingredients: Liostaigh na comhábhair uile atá sa táirge. Cuidíonn sé seo le húsáideoirí a bhfuil ailléirgí nó roghanna aiste bia acu.
info.nutrition: Cuir isteach luachanna cothaitheacha in aghaidh an 100g/ml mar a thaispeántar ar an bpacáistiú. Cuidíonn sé seo le húsáideoirí táirgí a chur i gcomparáid.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: De rogha air sin, cuir trácht leis chun cur síos a dhéanamh ar do chuid athruithe nó comhthéacs breise a sholáthar.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Cuidíonn an luach seo le ríomh comhréireach a dhéanamh ar gach cothaitheach in aghaidh an mhéid riar. Mar shampla, 60 g, 60 g nó 60 G (is fearr an chéad cheann), 1000 ml nó 1 L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Coinnigh an t-ord bunaidh. Léirigh an céatadán nuair a shonraítear é. Deighil le camóg nó fleiscín agus bain úsáid as lúibíní le haghaidh comhábhair de chomhábhar.
tooltips.categories: Ná cuir in iúl ach an chatagóir is sainiúla. Cuirfear catagóirí tuismitheora leis go huathoibríoch. Mar shampla, 'Sairdíní in ola olóige', 'Sú oráiste ó thiúchan'.
tooltips.product_name: Is é ainm an táirge an príomhainm atá clóite ar an bpacáistiú. Is féidir gur trádmharc cláraithe é. Mar shampla, 'Nesquik', 'Trátaí Ketchup'. Ná cuir an branda san ainm.
tooltips.brand_name: Cuir isteach gach branda den táirge. Ba chóir an príomhbhranda, a bhíonn le feiceáil go soiléir ar an bpacáiste tosaigh de ghnáth, a chur isteach ar dtús. Mar shampla, 'Nutella, 'Oreo, Mondelez'
tooltips.quantity: Cóipeáil an luach atá léirithe ar an táirge agus ná déan dearmad ar na haonaid. Mar shampla, 230g, 6 (le haghaidh 6 ubh), 3 x 150g (le haghaidh táirge ina bhfuil 3 bhosca, 150g i ngach ceann).
tooltips.labels: Aon tréith den táirge **atá fíorasach** agus difriúil ó na réimsí eile. Mar shampla, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Déanta sa Bheilg, táirgthe sa Bhriotáin…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Cuir isteach an siopa inar cheannaigh tú an táirge. Mar shampla, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Cuir aon tásca tionscnaimh a gheobhaidh tú ar an bpacáistiú leis. Ní gá duit a bheith buartha faoi na tionscnaimh a léirítear go díreach sa liosta comhábhar. Mar shampla, 'Mairteoil ón Airgintín', 'Ní thagann an pónaire soighe ón Aontas Eorpach'.
tooltips.traceability_code: Sa chuid seo, is féidir leat cóid a bhaineann le marcanna pacáistíochta, marcanna aitheantais nó marcanna sláinte a ionchur.
tooltips.countries: Tíortha ina bhfuil an táirge ar fáil go forleathan (gan siopaí a dhéanann speisialtóireacht i dtáirgí coigríche a áireamh).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Ainm

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Cuir isteach líon na n-aonad pacáistíochta den chruth agus den ábhar céanna atá sa táirge.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Cuir isteach ainm an chrutha atá liostaithe sna treoracha athchúrsála má tá siad ar fáil, nó roghnaigh cruth.
packaging_component.material_desc: Cuir isteach an t-ábhar sonrach más féidir é a chinneadh (is minic a bhíonn cód ábhair taobh istigh de thriantán le fáil ar chodanna pacáistíochta), nó ábhar cineálach (mar shampla plaisteach nó miotal) mura bhfuil tú cinnte.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Ná cuir isteach treoracha athchúrsála ach amháin má tá siad liostaithe ar an táirge.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Cuir isteach an meáchan glan nó an toirt ghlan agus léirigh an t-aonad (mar shampla g nó ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url_add: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer
edit.generic_name_placeholder: e.g., Chocolate chip cookies, Orange juice

missing_number.title: Serving size is missing a number
missing_number.desc: Serving size should include a numeric value. Examples: {examples}

missing_unit.title: Serving size is missing a unit
missing_unit.desc: Serving size should include a unit. Examples: {examples}

unknown_unit.title: Serving size unit may be incorrect
unknown_unit.desc: Serving size should include a common unit. Examples: {examples}

edit.no_nutrition_data: Gan aon fhaisnéis chothaithe ar an táirge
edit.comment_placeholder: Cuir trácht leis an eagarthóireacht seo

toast.save_error: Failed to save product. Please try again.

edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Ná huaslódáil grianghraif nach leatsa nó nach bhfuil na cearta agat orthu. Tá sé mídhleathach íomhánna cóipchirt a uaslódáil gan chead agus d’fhéadfadh go gcuirfí do chuntas ar fionraí dá bharr.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Ná huaslódáil ach do ghrianghraif féin nó grianghraif a bhfuil cead sainráite agat iad a úsáid.

qr.barcode_scanned_not_found: Rinneadh scanadh rathúil ar an gcód barra {barcode} , ach ní bhfuarthas aon táirge inár n-Fíricí Bia Oscailte, Fíricí Áilleachta Oscailte, Fíricí Táirgí Oscailte ná Fíricí Bia Peataí Oscailte.

network.title: Earráid Ceangail
network.message: Theip ar cheangal leis an bhfreastalaí Open Food Facts. Seiceáil do nasc idirlín agus déan iarracht arís.
network.instructions: Má leanann an fhadhb, tabhair cuairt ar an Leathanach Stádas Faisnéise Bia Oscailte.

facets.facet_website_title: Ag iniúchadh {facet} - Oscail Taiscéalaí Fíricí Bia
facets.facet_website_description: Faigh amach an chatagóir {facet} ar Open Food Facts Explorer.
facets.facet_value_website_title: Ag iniúchadh {facet}: {value} - Oscail Taiscéalaí Fíricí Bia
facets.facet_value_website_description: Faigh amach an chatagóir {value} ar Open Food Facts Explorer.
facets.facet_back_to_overview: Ar ais go dtí an forbhreathnú {facet}

landing.title: Oscail Taiscéalaí Fíricí Bia
landing.subtitle: Bunachar sonraí comhoibríoch, saor in aisce agus oscailte de tháirgí bia ó ar fud an domhain. Faigh amach, cuardaigh, agus cuir le trédhearcacht bia do chách.
landing.explore_products_desc: Brabhsáil na milliúin táirgí bia, féach fíricí cothaithe, agus déan roghanna eolasacha.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

explore.title: Fiosraigh Fíricí Bia Oscailte
explore.subtitle: Faigh amach táirgí treochta, catagóirí coitianta, agus cuir le trédhearcacht bia!
explore.trending_products_desc: Féach cé na táirgí atá á bhfeicthiú agus á n-eagarthóireacht is mó faoi láthair.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Brabhsáil na catagóirí bia is mó tóir inár mbunachar sonraí.
explore.recently_added_desc: Féach ar na táirgí is déanaí atá curtha leis ag an bpobal.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Cabhraigh le Open Food Facts a fheabhsú trí tháirgí a chur leis nó a chur in eagar, nó trí cheisteanna a fhreagairt.
explore.random_product_desc: An bhfuil an t-ádh ort? Aimsigh táirge randamach ónár mbunachar sonraí.
explore.learn_more_desc: Faigh amach conas a oibríonn Open Food Facts agus conas is féidir leat cabhrú.

compare.page_description: Compare nutritional information of food products
compare.share_text: Check out this product comparison I made!
compare.add_products_hint: Add products from their detail pages to start comparing nutritional values
compare.replace_comparison: This will replace your current comparison with {count, plural, =1 {1 product} other {# products}}. Continue?
compare.invalid_link_hint: This link doesn't contain any valid products to compare
compare.name: Ainm
compare.hint_relative_first: 💡 Percentages show difference compared to the first product
compare.hint_relative_best: 💡 Percentages show difference compared to the best value (lower is better for most nutrients)
